features.description: bio.{en,ko}.json about narrative 1문단 + projects.json kuma+primerbench만 + has_minidemo 키 삭제
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'for f in src/data/bio.en.json src/data/bio.ko.json src/content/projects.json; do python3 -c "import json; json.load(open(\"$f\"))" || exit 1; done && [ $(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\"src/content/projects.json\")); print(len(d[\"projects\"]))") -eq 2 ]'

features.description: About.astro lede 참조 제거 + SoftwareCard.astro has_minidemo 분기 제거
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && ! grep -q "about.lede\|has_minidemo\|minidemo-trigger" src/components/sections/About.astro src/components/SoftwareCard.astro && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1'

features.description: KuroDemo.tsx 삭제 + pages KuroDemo import/section 제거 + CmdK.tsx projects 정리
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && [ ! -f src/islands/KuroDemo.tsx ] && ! grep -rq "KuroDemo" src/ && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1'

features.description: Typewriter.tsx DEFAULT_LABELS 동사구 교체 + Hero.astro I-pattern 문장 + KO 어순 분기
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && grep -q "engineer methane-eating microbes" src/islands/Typewriter.tsx && grep -q "메탄을 먹는 미생물을 공학합니다" src/islands/Typewriter.tsx && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1'

features.description: EntryNav.astro 신규 (3 nav cards) + Hero.astro 하단 마운트
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && [ -f src/components/sections/EntryNav.astro ] && grep -q "EntryNav" src/components/sections/Hero.astro && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1'

features.description: 통합 typecheck + build + dist HTML grep 검증 + 보고서 기록
features.verify_command: bash -lc 'cd /Users/gml/_workspace/personal-site && bun run typecheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run build >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q "engineer methane-eating microbes" dist/index.html && ! grep -q "kuro-demo\|KuroDemo" dist/index.html dist/ko/index.html && grep -q "kuma" dist/index.html'
